title: Iran declares blockade of Strait of Hormuz and US attacks its military installations
summary: Tensions in the Middle East escalate after the US bombards more than 140 Iranian targets in response to Tehran's threat to close the strategic maritime passage.

title: England and Argentina advance to World Cup semifinals after extra-time wins
summary: Bellingham and Messi's teams overcome their respective quarterfinal duels against Norway and Switzerland, and prepare for the next round.

title: Rainy season ends in Shikoku with warning of extreme temperatures
summary: The Japan Meteorological Agency announced the end of tsuyu (rainy season) in the region, with forecasts of up to 38 degrees and risk of heatstroke.

title: Yamamoto suffers sixth loss, Ohtani gets a hit and Yoshida hits a homer in MLB
summary: The Dodgers pitcher allowed six runs for his sixth loss, while Ohtani went 1-for-3 and Yoshida hit a three-run homer.

title: Japanese prospect Rintaro Sasaki not drafted on first day of MLB draft
summary: Despite being one of the most promising pitchers, Sasaki was not selected in the first four rounds of the Major League draft.

title: Yui Ueda wins wheelchair Wimbledon without dropping a game
summary: The Japanese tennis player defeated her opponent 6-0, 6-0 to win the Grand Slam title and complete her career Golden Slam.

title: Search for 16-year-old girl missing after jet ski capsizes in Chiba
summary: The girl fell into the water along with two other people when the vessel capsized near the river mouth; authorities continue the search.

title: 33-year-old man arrested for murdering a nurse with hammer blows in Sapporo
summary: The suspect surrendered to police after the deadly attack on a 22-year-old woman at her workplace; the motive for the crime is being investigated.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi attends tribute to Shinzo Abe while senior official visits his grave
summary: The head of government attends an event in memory of the former leader, while Deputy Spokesperson Sato goes to the cemetery in Nagato to honor him.

title: LDP does not plan to extend Diet session and seeks to pass all laws before closure
summary: In the meeting of legislative affairs officials, the ruling party insisted on finishing projects in the regular session, while the opposition demands more debate.

title: Typhoon 9 hits China and fells trees in Miyazaki
summary: The weather phenomenon made landfall in China causing evacuations, and in Japan it toppled century-old cherry trees that residents are trying to recover.

title: 100 days before Asian Para Games, Aichi unveils medals
summary: The governor of the host prefecture participated in the countdown ceremony and highlighted the commitment to a more inclusive society.

title: Yutaka Take reaches 5,000 wins in horse racing
summary: The legendary Japanese jockey achieves a historic milestone by compiling 5,000 career victories, including national and international competitions.

title: Linda Noskova crowned Wimbledon women's singles champion
summary: The Czech tennis player defeats her opponent in the final to win her first Grand Slam title at the All England Club.

title: Japan's oldest koala, Nozomi, dies at age 24
summary: The female koala, very popular among visitors and on social media, passed away peacefully surrounded by her keepers at the zoo.

title: Search for missing 5-year-old boy in Kagoshima continues without success
summary: Authorities continue search operations in the area where the child was last seen three weeks ago.

title: Evacuation ordered for 2,083 people in Senboku, Akita, due to heavy rain
summary: Authorities issued an evacuation order for 924 households in the Kakunodate district due to risk of landslides.

title: Bear that took refuge in a warehouse in Nara euthanized
summary: The emergency hunt using firearms was carried out for the first time in the Kinki region to eliminate the animal that posed a threat.

title: Japanese Yuki Kawamura scores 12 points in NBA Summer League
summary: The Memphis Grizzlies point guard participates in the Summer League with 12 points and 3 assists, showing his potential.

title: Debate over imperial succession divides LDP
summary: Veterans of the ruling party express reservations about the future of succession to the throne, highlighting the difficulties of constitutional debate.
